Bus Timings

Bus 66 Timetable Ghubaiba Bus Station to Faqa, Terminus / Al Faqa'a Family Park

October 25, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Hey, let’s talk about Bus 66 - it’s a real lifesaver if you’re trying to get around Dubai. This route’s like a magic carpet ride from Ghubaiba Bus Station all the way to Faqa, Terminus / Al Faqa’a Family Park. Whether you’re a local just trying to get to work or a tourist out to explore, Bus 66 has got you covered.

It swings by all sorts of cool spots - you’ve got your neighborhoods, shopping areas, and even parks along the way. So if you’re looking to cruise through Dubai’s bustling streets without the headache of driving, just hop on the 66. Trust me, once you’ve tried it, you’ll wonder how you ever got around without it.

Route Name 66
Route Description Ghubaiba Bus Station · 48 - Faqa, Terminus / Al Faqa’a Family Park
Total Distance Approximately 63.15 to 74.2 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 126.6 to 222.6 minutes
Operational Hours 05:30 to 21:35 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website Official Website

Bus 66 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus 66 runs with the following schedule:

From Ghubaiba Bus Station From Faqa, Terminus / Al Faqa’a Family Park
05:30 07:35
07:30 09:35
09:30 11:35
11:30 13:35
13:30 15:35
15:30 17:35
17:35 19:45
19:35 21:35

Bus 66 Timetable

For detailed bus timings, please go to the RTA website or use this link for Bus 66 Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus 66 is AED 3. This economical pricing makes it an affordable choice for passengers traveling along its route. Whether you’re commuting for work or exploring the city, Bus 66 provides a cost-effective way to reach your destination. Additionally, the consistent service throughout the day ensures you can rely on it for both planned and spontaneous trips.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus 66 does not offer online booking options. Passengers can board the bus at any of the designated stops along the route. For real-time updates on schedules and stop locations, it is recommended to use the RTA Dubai app or visit the official website for the most accurate information.

Bus Route

Bus 66 operates on the following route:

  1. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 48

  2. Raffa

  3. Rolla

  4. Sharaf DG Metro · 1

  5. Four Point Sheraton Hotel

  6. BurJuman Metro · 3

  7. Broadcast Interchange

  8. Oud Metha Metro · 1

  9. Oud Metha Road

  10. Oud Metha Road, 2

  11. Wafi City

  12. Wasl Club

  13. Emarat Petrol Station

  14. Emirates NBD

  15. Nad Al Shiba 2, Main Masjid

  16. Nad Al Shiba, Intersection

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. EPPCO, Muntazah Petrol Station

  2. Dubai Outlet Mall

  3. Al Fathan Masjid

  4. Air Force Training School

  5. Murquab, Interchange

  6. Faqa, Terminus / Al Faqa’a Family Park

Some other Dubai bus routes you can check are the 67 bus route, which runs from Endurance City Terminus to Ghubaiba Bus Station, and the 77 route, which operates from Baniyas Square Metro to Al Garhoud, Cambridge International School, and back.

Bus 66 Station Overview

Ghubiba Bus Station · 48

Ghubiba Bus Station · 48 is a prominent transportation hub located in the Ghubiba area of Dubai. This station is well-equipped to handle a high volume of passengers, with amenities such as sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates.

Its central location provides convenient access to the surrounding neighborhoods, making it a vital part of the local transportation network. The station’s facilities and strategic position near key commercial and residential areas ensure an efficient transit experience for commuters.

Intersecting Bus Routes at Burjuman Metro Bus Stop

The Burjuman Metro Bus Stop serves as a major transit hub where several bus routes intersect, enhancing connectivity for passengers throughout Dubai. Key routes that converge at this station include 66, 67, 61D, C03, C18, F70, X23, and X25.

This central location provides seamless travel options across different city areas, making it a vital stop for commuters and ensuring efficient access to various destinations.

Faqa, Terminus / Al Faqa’a Family Park

Faqa, Terminus, also known as Al Faqa’a Family Park, is a significant bus station situated in the Faqa area. This terminus serves as a key transit point for passengers traveling within and beyond the region. The station offers essential amenities, including comfortable waiting areas and ticketing services, to enhance the travel experience.

Its proximity to the Al Faqa’a Family Park makes it a convenient stop for visitors to the park and local residents. The terminus plays an important role in providing efficient transportation options for the Faqa area and surrounding regions.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus 66 passes by several notable destinations and attractions in Dubai. Here’s a rundown of some key points of interest along the route:

  1. BurJuman Metro Station - This is a major shopping and entertainment hub, home to the BurJuman Mall, which offers a range of retail stores, dining options, and a cinema.

  2. Wafi City - A popular shopping and leisure destination featuring a distinctive architectural style and a variety of shops, restaurants, and entertainment options.

3.

  1. Four Points Sheraton Hotel - Situated in the heart of Bur Dubai, this hotel provides comfortable accommodations and is close to several tourist attractions and cultural sites.

  2. Nad Al Shiba 2, Main Masjid - A significant mosque in the area, it is an important place of worship and a notable landmark.

6.

These stops make Bus 66 a convenient option for accessing various attractions and amenities across Dubai.

Journey Experience

Taking Bus Route 66 from Ghubaiba Bus Station to Faqa, Terminus / Al Faqa’a Family Park offers a delightful journey through Dubai’s diverse landscape. Starting at the bustling Ghubaiba, a major transport hub, the bus navigates through vibrant neighborhoods like Al Karama and Jumeirah, showcasing a blend of modern skyscrapers and traditional architecture, along with lively markets and quaint cafes that reflect the city’s rich culture.

As you travel further towards the outskirts, the urban scenery transitions to the tranquil beauty of Al Faqa’a, known for its family-friendly parks. Al Faqa’a Family Park is a highlight, featuring ample space for picnics, playgrounds, and recreational activities, making it an ideal spot for families to unwind and enjoy nature. This trip not only connects you to a peaceful retreat but also showcases the unique character of Dubai, blending urban excitement with serene landscapes.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, unfortunately, you cannot reach Faqa, Terminus / Al Faqa’a Family Park, the furthest point on the Bus 66 route starting from Ghubaiba Bus Station · 48.

In conclusion, Bus 66 is a reliable and affordable option for navigating various parts of Dubai. With its comprehensive route and regular service, it provides a valuable link between key areas and destinations in the city. The bus’s frequent stops and well-planned schedule make it a convenient choice for both daily commutes and casual travel. Whether you’re heading to work, shopping, or exploring, Bus 66 ensures you can travel efficiently across Dubai.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 25, 2025.
